changeSet.author: openelis-viral-vaccine

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Viral & Vaccine Unit Laboratory' AND is_template = true
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook_page np JOIN clinlims.notebook n ON np.notebook_id = n.id WHERE n.title = 'Viral & Vaccine Unit Laboratory' AND n.is_template = true AND np.page_order = 3

changeSet.comment: Create Sterilization page for Viral & Vaccine Unit Laboratory

column.name: instructions
column.value: Ensure sterility of prepared materials. Record sterilization method (autoclave, filtration), parameters (time, temperature, pressure), operator, and date/time. System links sterilization record to sample/media batch.

column.name: content
notebook_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Viral & Vaccine Unit Laboratory' AND is_template = true)

changeSet.author: openelis-viral-vaccine

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Viral & Vaccine Unit Laboratory' AND is_template = true
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook_page np JOIN clinlims.notebook n ON np.notebook_id = n.id WHERE n.title = 'Viral & Vaccine Unit Laboratory' AND n.is_template = true AND np.page_order = 4

changeSet.comment: Create Cell Culture page for Viral & Vaccine Unit Laboratory

column.name: instructions
column.value: Grow host cells for viral inoculation. Record cell line, growth conditions, incubator ID, and start date. System creates cell culture batch and links to sample.

column.name: content
notebook_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Viral & Vaccine Unit Laboratory' AND is_template = true)

changeSet.author: openelis-viral-vaccine

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Viral & Vaccine Unit Laboratory' AND is_template = true
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook_page np JOIN clinlims.notebook n ON np.notebook_id = n.id WHERE n.title = 'Viral & Vaccine Unit Laboratory' AND n.is_template = true AND np.page_order = 5

changeSet.comment: Create Cell Culture QC page for Viral & Vaccine Unit Laboratory

column.name: instructions
column.value: Confirm viability and sterility before inoculation. Record viability check result, sterility check result, QC status (Pass/Fail), and remarks. System logs QC and blocks progression if failed.

column.name: content
notebook_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Viral & Vaccine Unit Laboratory' AND is_template = true)

changeSet.author: openelis-viral-vaccine

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Viral & Vaccine Unit Laboratory' AND is_template = true
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook_page np JOIN clinlims.notebook n ON np.notebook_id = n.id WHERE n.title = 'Viral & Vaccine Unit Laboratory' AND n.is_template = true AND np.page_order = 6

changeSet.comment: Create Virus Culture Inoculation page for Viral & Vaccine Unit Laboratory

column.name: instructions
column.value: Introduce virus into host cells. Record virus strain, inoculation date, culture conditions, and operator. System creates virus culture batch and links to original sample.

column.name: content
notebook_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Viral & Vaccine Unit Laboratory' AND is_template = true)

changeSet.author: openelis-viral-vaccine

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Viral & Vaccine Unit Laboratory' AND is_template = true
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook_page np JOIN clinlims.notebook n ON np.notebook_id = n.id WHERE n.title = 'Viral & Vaccine Unit Laboratory' AND n.is_template = true AND np.page_order = 7

changeSet.comment: Create Imaging / Analysis page for Viral & Vaccine Unit Laboratory

column.name: instructions
column.value: Monitor viral growth visually. Record imaging method, imaging date, observations, and upload images. System stores image data and links to culture batch.

column.name: content
notebook_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Viral & Vaccine Unit Laboratory' AND is_template = true)

changeSet.author: openelis-viral-vaccine

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Viral & Vaccine Unit Laboratory' AND is_template = true
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook_page np JOIN clinlims.notebook n ON np.notebook_id = n.id WHERE n.title = 'Viral & Vaccine Unit Laboratory' AND n.is_template = true AND np.page_order = 8

changeSet.comment: Create Culture Maintenance page for Viral & Vaccine Unit Laboratory

column.name: instructions
column.value: Maintain active viral culture. Record feeding schedule, reagents used, date/time, and technician. System creates maintenance log.

column.name: content
notebook_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Viral & Vaccine Unit Laboratory' AND is_template = true)

changeSet.author: openelis-viral-vaccine

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Viral & Vaccine Unit Laboratory' AND is_template = true
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook_page np JOIN clinlims.notebook n ON np.notebook_id = n.id WHERE n.title = 'Viral & Vaccine Unit Laboratory' AND n.is_template = true AND np.page_order = 9

changeSet.comment: Create Formulation & Packaging page for Viral & Vaccine Unit Laboratory

column.name: instructions
column.value: Prepare and package viral product. Record formulation details, final product description, packaging specifications, and batch ID. System links final product batch to sample and sets status to Viral Processing Completed.

column.name: content
notebook_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Viral & Vaccine Unit Laboratory' AND is_template = true)

changeSet.author: openelis-viral-vaccine

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Viral & Vaccine Unit Laboratory' AND is_template = true
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook_page np JOIN clinlims.notebook n ON np.notebook_id = n.id WHERE n.title = 'Viral & Vaccine Unit Laboratory' AND n.is_template = true AND np.page_order = 10

changeSet.comment: Create Virus Isolation & Titer page for Viral & Vaccine Unit Laboratory

column.name: instructions
column.value: Record culture batch reference, viral titer values, measurement method, and date. System links quantitative data to sample.

column.name: content
notebook_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Viral & Vaccine Unit Laboratory' AND is_template = true)

changeSet.author: openelis-viral-vaccine

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Viral & Vaccine Unit Laboratory' AND is_template = true
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook_page np JOIN clinlims.notebook n ON np.notebook_id = n.id WHERE n.title = 'Viral & Vaccine Unit Laboratory' AND n.is_template = true AND np.page_order = 11

changeSet.comment: Create Genome Sequencing page for Viral & Vaccine Unit Laboratory

column.name: instructions
column.value: Record sequencing platform, upload sequence files, and QC metrics. System stores genome data and links to sample/culture batch.

column.name: content
notebook_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Viral & Vaccine Unit Laboratory' AND is_template = true)

changeSet.author: openelis-viral-vaccine

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Viral & Vaccine Unit Laboratory' AND is_template = true
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook_page np JOIN clinlims.notebook n ON np.notebook_id = n.id WHERE n.title = 'Viral & Vaccine Unit Laboratory' AND n.is_template = true AND np.page_order = 12

changeSet.comment: Create Seed Virus Production page for Viral & Vaccine Unit Laboratory

column.name: instructions
column.value: Record selected strain, selection criteria, and approval details. System creates seed virus record and links to sample.

column.name: content
notebook_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Viral & Vaccine Unit Laboratory' AND is_template = true)

changeSet.author: openelis-viral-vaccine

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Viral & Vaccine Unit Laboratory' AND is_template = true
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook_page np JOIN clinlims.notebook n ON np.notebook_id = n.id WHERE n.title = 'Viral & Vaccine Unit Laboratory' AND n.is_template = true AND np.page_order = 13

changeSet.comment: Create Trial Reference page for Viral & Vaccine Unit Laboratory

column.name: instructions
column.value: Maintain traceability without executing trials. Record trial phase (Preclinical/Clinical), external institution, start/end dates, and outcome summary. System links external reference to seed virus/sample.

column.name: content
notebook_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Viral & Vaccine Unit Laboratory' AND is_template = true)

changeSet.author: openelis-viral-vaccine

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.workflow_page_template WHERE workflow_category = 'VIRAL_VACCINE'

changeSet.comment: Insert additional Viral & Vaccine Unit workflow page templates (pages 3-13)

column.name: description
column.value: Grow host cells for viral inoculation

column.name: description
column.value: Confirm viability and sterility before inoculation
